_meta.description: D6 fixtures for google-adk / gen-ui-open-advanced (open-gen-ui-advanced demo)

fixtures._comment: gen-ui-open-advanced — first pill: 3D axis visualization. The advanced demo renders inside a sandboxed iframe with allow-scripts. Reuses the same generateSandboxedUi payload as gen-ui-open but with a distinct call ID.

toolCalls.name: generateSandboxedUi
toolCalls.arguments:
{"initialHeight":480,"placeholderMessages":["Composing 3D axis scene…"],"css":"body{margin:0;font-family:system-ui;background:#0f172a;color:#e2e8f0}.wrap{padding:16px}h1{font-size:14px;margin:0 0 8px}svg{display:block;background:#1e293b;border-radius:8px}","html":"

3D axis visualization (pitch / yaw / roll)

"}

fixtures._comment: gen-ui-open-advanced — 3D axis follow-up after tool result.

response.content: Here's the 3D axis visualization rendered in the advanced sandboxed iframe — pitch, yaw, and roll axes are displayed.
